nasb.text: And He said to me, “Son of man, thus says the Lord God, ‘These are the statutes for the altar on the day it is built, to offer burnt offerings on it and to sprinkle blood on it.

esv.text: And he said to me, “Son of man, thus says the Lord God: These are the ordinances for the altar: On the day when it is erected for offering burnt offerings upon it and for throwing blood against it,

cnv.text: 他對我說：“人子啊！主耶和華這樣說：祭壇的規條是這樣：做成了祭壇，在上面獻燔祭、灑上血的時候，

ccb.text: 祂对我说：“人子啊，主耶和华这样说，‘祭坛建成后，要按以下的规矩在上面献燔祭和洒血。
